# Security Policy for renaealisha54-debug

## Supported Versions
Security updates are focused on the main branch of this repository.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest  | :white_check_mark: |
| < Latest| :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you find a security bug in this debug project, please do not open a public issue. 
Submit security reports via GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting if enabled, 
or contact the maintainer directly through your preferred private channel.
